title: Construction Integration Supervisor (FPSO)
description:
Purpose

The Construction Integration Supervisor is responsible for overseeing the integration of all construction activities to ensure that work processes align efficiently and effectively. This role ensures compliance with project HSSE, Quality, and schedule requirements while coordinating multidisciplinary construction efforts.

Job Description

  • Supervise construction teams to ensure high‑quality work is delivered on schedule and in accordance with HSSE and Quality standards.
  • Monitor construction activities and provide training where required.
  • Conduct routine inspections of equipment, materials, and worksites.
  • Schedule and coordinate regular meetings with vendors, inspectors, managers, and internal stakeholders.
  • Prepare and present reports, budgets, and project plans to relevant parties.
  • Collaborate closely with architects and other technical professionals to ensure seamless integration of construction activities.
  • Stay updated on safety codes, regulations, and industry advancements.

Requirements

  • Minimum Diploma or Bachelor's degree in Engineering, Construction Management, or a related field
  • Minimum 10 years of experience as a Construction Supervisor or in a similar role, with strong understanding of construction and commissioning management processes within the relevant discipline.
  • Ability to Interpret blueprints, plans, and technical documentation

Experience Functional Competencies:

  • Inspection, Testing, Commissioning & Monitoring
  • Construction, Commissioning & Quality Strategy
  • Third‑Party Relationship Management
  • FPSO Topsides
  • HSSE, Quality, Regulatory & Process Safety Leadership
  • Technical Understanding (Design & Execution)
  • Risk Management
  • Planning & Coordination

postedCompany.description:
Brunel is a leading provider of recruitment and workforce solutions throughout Asia and around the world. We excel at connecting specialist jobseekers with employment opportunities across conventional and renewable energy, life sciences, mining and manufacturing.


Our extensive network is comprised of 20 offices throughout Asia, including Brunel’s regional headquarters in Singapore and satellite offices across China, Japan, Malaysia, Indonesia, Thailand, Vietnam, South Korea and Taiwan + a further 100 locations worldwide.
